title: Nvidia invests $40B in companies that spend on Nvidia
desc: Daily AI news satire. Nvidia pours $40B into companies whose business model is buying more Nvidia GPUs.

beats.name: vault-doors-cold-open
beats.narration: Nvidia has committed more than forty billion dollars in equity bets this year.

beats.name: dragon-on-hoard
beats.narration: The money is going to companies that build artificial intelligence.

beats.name: coin-launches-into-tube
beats.narration: Those companies use the money to buy chips. From Nvidia.

beats.name: tube-snakes-through-city
beats.narration: The largest bet is a thirty-billion-dollar check for OpenAI.

beats.name: tower-receives-coin
beats.narration: Other recent deals include up to two-point-one billion for IREN.

beats.name: tower-sends-chipbox-back
beats.narration: And up to three-point-two billion for Corning, per CNBC.

beats.name: hoard-grows-from-returns
beats.narration: Nvidia's revenue is then used to fund additional equity rounds.

beats.name: wide-reveal-closed-ring
beats.narration: The cash leaves Nvidia, visits a customer, and comes back as a chip order.

beats.name: mask-off-same-dragon
beats.narration: Reports describe Nvidia as the AI economy's largest equity investor.

beats.name: ledger-arrow-loops
beats.narration: Big Tech capital expenditure on AI is expected to top one trillion dollars in 2027.

beats.name: calculator-infinity
beats.narration: Analysts have begun describing the pattern as circular.

beats.name: ronin-walks-into-shadow
beats.narration: The cycle continues, indistinguishable from value creation.

sources.attribution: Nvidia embraces AI investor, topping $40 billion in equity bets (CNBC)
Big Tech capital expenditures now seen topping $1 trillion in 2027 (CNBC)

transcript: Nvidia has committed more than forty billion dollars in equity bets this year. The money is going to companies that build artificial intelligence. Those companies use the money to buy chips. From Nvidia. The largest bet is a thirty-billion-dollar check for OpenAI. Other recent deals include up to two-point-one billion for IREN. And up to three-point-two billion for Corning, per CNBC. Nvidia's revenue is then used to fund additional equity rounds. The cash leaves Nvidia, visits a customer, and comes back as a chip order. Reports describe Nvidia as the AI economy's largest equity investor. Big Tech capital expenditure on AI is expected to top one trillion dollars in 2027. Analysts have begun describing the pattern as circular. The cycle continues, indistinguishable from value creation.
